title: ANC - ANC and Transparency are Off, make a call, ANC is off but active and Transparency is disabled
scenario: ANC activates during a call when both ANC and Transparency are set to OFF, while Transparency becomes disabled and greyed out
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Set ANC to OFF (no selected value).
5. Set Transparency Mode to OFF (no selected value).
6. Verify that both ANC and Transparency are showing as OFF with no selected values.
7. Make a phone call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device (e.g., press Call button or initiate call from phone dialer).
8. During the active call, return to Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Audio Settings.
9. Observe the state of ANC and Transparency controls.
expected: ANC should remain OFF but the control should be user-adjustable (not greyed out). Transparency should be disabled/greyed out with no selected values during the call.
